00030 #ifndef _LAMEBUS_LSCREEN_H_
00031 #define _LAMEBUS_LSCREEN_H_
00032 
00033 /*
00034  * Hardware device data for memory-mapped fullscreen text console.
00035  */
00036 struct lscreen_softc {
00037         /* Initialized by config function */
00038         struct spinlock ls_lock;      // protects data and device regs
00039         unsigned ls_width, ls_height; // screen size
00040         unsigned ls_cx, ls_cy;        // cursor position
00041         char *ls_screen;              // memory-mapped screen buffer
00042 
00043         /* Initialized by lower-level attachment function */
00044         void *ls_busdata;               // bus we're on
00045         uint32_t ls_buspos;             // position on that bus
00046 
00047         /* Initialized by higher-level attachment function */
00048         void *ls_devdata;                       // data and functions for
00049         void (*ls_start)(void *devdata);        // upper device (perhaps
00050         void (*ls_input)(void *devdata, int ch); // console)
00051 };
00052 
00053 /* Functions called by lower-level drivers */
00054 void lscreen_irq(/*struct lser_softc*/ void *sc);  // interrupt handler
00055 
00056 /* Functions called by higher-level drivers */
00057 void lscreen_write(/*struct lser_softc*/ void *sc, int ch); // output function
00058 
00059 #endif /* _LAMEBUS_LSCREEN_H_ */
